user.title: Connect to Kirk Hill Wind Farm
user.description: Enter the API token from your dashboard at dashboard.kirkhillcoop.org.

income_rate.title: Income Rate (optional)
income_rate.description: Optionally enter the rate you receive per kWh and the date it applies from. Leave the rate blank to skip — you can configure income tracking later via the integration's Configure button.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Kirk Hill dashboard. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Generate a new key from your dashboard.
error.invalid_date: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
error.invalid_rate: Income rate must be a positive number.

abort.already_configured: Kirk Hill Wind Farm is already configured.

add_rate.title: Add Income Rate
add_rate.description: Add a new income rate. If a rate already exists for this date it will be replaced.
